built_from.document_title: Building an ADMET and molecular-property editing dataset in single-question multi-answer format

sources.name: ChEMBL
sources.license_notes: CC BY-SA 3.0; check ChEMBL FAQ for property calculation caveats.
sources.use: Primary source for curated bioactivity and ADMET-like assay labels.

sources.name: PubChem
sources.license_notes: Public/free NIH/NCBI resource; still preserve contributor provenance.
sources.use: Scale-up compounds, assay mapping, CID/SID/AID cross-reference.

sources.name: BindingDB
sources.license_notes: Public BindingDB download; preserve BindingDB, article DOI, PMID, and curation/date provenance.
sources.use: Curated target-binding Ki/IC50/Kd/EC50 measurements converted to pKi/pIC50/pKd/pEC50 endpoints.

sources.name: ToxCast / DSSTox / CompTox
sources.access: EPA releases, CTX APIs, Dashboard downloads
sources.license_notes: EPA open data; preserve release and assay provenance.
sources.use: Mechanistic toxicity labels, AC50/hit calls, assay annotations.

sources.name: Tox21
sources.license_notes: Public federal resource; verify stable bulk download path at build time.
sources.use: Nuclear receptor, stress pathway, qHTS toxicity labels.

sources.name: DrugBank
sources.license_notes: Restricted; do not redistribute merged public artifacts without license review.
sources.use: Drug warnings, mechanisms, indications, route/admin metadata.

sources.name: ZINC20
sources.license_notes: Verify terms on chosen distribution site/mirror.
sources.use: Seed/candidate/pretraining molecule reservoir, not ADMET ground truth.

sources.name: TDC / MoleculeNet / AqSolDB / literature
sources.license_notes: Check each dataset license before redistribution.
sources.use: Clean smaller endpoints and benchmark comparison.

sources.name: ADMET predictors
sources.license_notes: Store model/version/date/uncertainty/applicability domain; do not publish as experimental truth.
sources.use: Candidate ranking, silver labels, teacher-student pretraining, local imputers.
